mapper.select: SELECT A.ATCH_FILE_ID AS atchFileId , B.FILE_CN AS fileCn , B.FILE_SN AS fileSn , B.FILE_STRE_COURS AS fileStreCours , B.STRE_FILE_NM AS streFileNm , B.FILE_EXTSN AS fileExtsn , B.ORIGNL_FILE_NM AS orignlFileNm , B.FILE_SIZE AS fileMg , A.CREAT_DT AS creatDt FROM XBOLTDLM.COMTNFILE A , XBOLTDLM.COMTNFILEDETAIL B WHERE A.ATCH_FILE_ID = #{ATCH_FILE_ID} AND A.ATCH_FILE_ID = B.ATCH_FILE_ID AND A.USE_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY B.FILE_SN
SELECT MAX(FILE_SN)+1 as FILE_SN FROM XBOLTDLM.COMTNFILEDETAIL WHERE ATCH_FILE_ID = #{AtchFileId}

SELECT ATCH_FILE_ID ,FILE_STRE_COURS+STRE_FILE_NM fullFileName ,FILE_SN ,FILE_STRE_COURS ,STRE_FILE_NM FileName ,ORIGNL_FILE_NM FileRealName FROM XBOLTDLM.COMTNFILEDETAIL WHERE ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} AND FILE_SN = #{Seq}
